Welcome to my website!
As a biostatistics graduate student at Case Western Reserve University with a background in public health and computer science, I am still learning how to bring these areas together in a careful and useful way. I am interested in epidemiology, data visualization, and statistics, and I use R, Python, and SAS to explore data, check ideas, and gradually deepen my understanding of public health questions.
